description: Balanced exact-first 70% K7/no-QJL Shmoosh policy for the first self-attention transformer block in each up_blocks.0 attention group of the local Underpaint Juggernaut SDXL checkpoint. This variant keeps Q rotation at ieee precision while using tf32 for packed score and attention-value dots.

validation.candidate_reason: All-TF32 is faster but pays a small reading-nook PSNR tax. This split keeps Q rotation at ieee precision while using tf32 for the score and value dots, recovering the hard-case PSNR in the 1024 suite.
validation.note: The image-run whole-image speedup is inflated by a slow first baseline pass, and scheduled quantized timing was noisy. Treat this as a quality-recovery candidate, not as a promoted fast default.
